KAREN_STAGE_HEART.description: At the start of combat, gain the Promise Pile. NL At the start of turn 2, add a [gold]Tower of Promise[/gold] to your hand.
KAREN_STAGE_HEART.flavor: A passionate heart for the stage.
KAREN_STAGE_HEART.title: Stage Heart
KAREN_LOCK_RELIC.title: Locked Relic
KAREN_LOCK_RELIC.flavor: The power of the relic is temporarily sealed.
